rationale: The citing paper references Lewis (2004) only once in a grouped literature citation to illustrate that customer retention has received increasing academic attention. It does not discuss Lewis's specific model, findings on loyalty programs, or empirical setting, and it does not use that paper to build assumptions, derive equations, or interpret results. The substantive development in the citing paper is anchored in diffusion/attrition and customer equity modeling rather than in this specific loyalty-program study.
